chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1415 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.1856/2025 (C/A) 22.12.2025 Mr. Anwer Ali Lohar, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Israr Ahmed Shah, Advocate for Respondents Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Manzoor Ahmed Kanrani, Deputy Commissioner, Ghotki and Survey Superintendent, Khairpur >>>>>..<<<<< Learned AAG files compliance reports on behalf of Deputy Commissioner, Ghotki and Survey Superintendent, Khairpur, which are taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the Petitioners. We are satisfied with the compliance reports filed today, hence no case for initiating contempt proceedings is made out. Consequently, the listed Contempt Application is dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
